title: Tac-Ops
description: Modpack for the Public tac-ops server
body:
Join the discord to take part in events!
https://discord.gg/heMjcTHyR7

the public server has sadly closed down due to finances but the pack is still playable and is alot of fun :)


In this pack we offer lots of fun we got planes u can fly around and attack bases in guns to have mini wars on with friends or just to protect your self we also have lots of decorative blocks too so you can make ur houses and projects look amazing. We do also have the create mod yes its a little complicated but its quite easy to learn if you have any problems please leave a message and we are sure to answer!

Get macaws windows here
[[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows/files]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-windows/files)
